question: Which of the following is true about the rainfall trend in City Q during 2023?

options.A: Rainfall remained constant throughout the year.
options.B: Rainfall was highest in January and lowest in September.
options.C: Rainfall was highest in September and lowest in January.
options.D: Rainfall steadily declined from January to June.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
